description: Derived KPIs computed from base columns across financial statements.

net_profit_margin.description: Net income as a percentage of revenue. Measures how much profit is retained per dollar of revenue.

gross_margin.description: Gross profit as a percentage of revenue. Measures production efficiency.

operating_margin.description: Operating income as a percentage of revenue. Measures core operational efficiency.

revenue_growth.description: Year-over-year percentage change in revenue. Measures top-line growth.

earnings_growth.description: Year-over-year percentage change in net income. Measures bottom-line growth.

return_on_assets.description: Net income divided by total assets. Measures how efficiently a company uses its assets to generate profit.

return_on_equity.description: Net income divided by stockholders equity. Measures return generated for shareholders.

debt_to_equity.description: Total debt divided by total stockholders equity. Measures financial leverage.

current_ratio.description: Total current assets divided by total current liabilities. Measures short-term liquidity.

free_cash_flow_margin.description: Free cash flow divided by revenue. Measures cash generation efficiency relative to sales.

capex_to_revenue.description: Capital expenditure as a percentage of revenue. Measures reinvestment intensity.

ebitda_margin.description: EBITDA divided by revenue. Measures operating profitability before non-cash charges.
